test.name: create_table_2
test.input: create table foo (a integer, b tinyint)

test.name: create_table_3
test.input: create table foo (a integer, b varchar)

test.name: create_table_4
test.input: create table if not exists foo (a integer, b varchar)

test.name: create_table_5
test.input: create table foo (a integer, b varchar)

test.name: create_table_10
test.input: create table foo (a integer constraint a not null)

test.name: create_table_11
test.input: create table foo (a integer primary key)

test.name: create_table_12
test.input: create table foo (a integer not null default 42)
